reference: I have been having pain in my abdomen that radiates to my back in the area of my gallbladder for about six months now. I have had several attacks that were so painful that I went to the emergency room. They never found anything to suggest a problem. While the symptoms are becoming more frequent, I do not want to waste more time and money if they cannot seem to find what exactly is wrong. Is there something specific I should ask the doctors to check? I just want to find out what it is. It is accompanied by nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Any advice?
